name: Maple Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 unbaked 10-inch pie shell, well chilled, fluted edge
Leaf shapes cut from pastry scraps
1 1/2 cups pumpkin puree, fresh or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. Mix together pumpkin, syrup, milk and eggs in a bowl until smooth.
3. Stir in flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger and salt until well blended.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
5. Bake for about 40 minutes or until firm and a knife inserted in center comes out clean.
6. Let cool completely.
7. While cooling, place leaf shapes on a cookie sheet and bake until golden brown.
8. Garnish top of pie with baked leaf shapes before cutting with a sharp knife.
